description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and enclosed by a fence. The structure features a flat roof and large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A driveway leads to a double garage at the front, while the backyard includes a kidney-shaped swimming pool and several mature trees providing shade. The exterior walls are finished in a light color with subtle brick or panel accents, and the property is bordered by privacy fencing on all sides. The layout suggests multiple rooms, including living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas, all on one level. The overall design is modern and functional, with outdoor spaces integrated for recreation and relaxation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a backyard pool, set within a fenced lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, and a portion of the backyard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a clear view of the backyard pool and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and the back facade with large windows and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, side rooms, and the continuation of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
